github.description: GitHub MCP Server — gives Coder Agent read/write access to repo files, PRs, branches

azure.description: Azure MCP Server — used by Deployer Agent for Azure resource management

tools.name: security_scanner
tools.description: Scans Python code for bugs (pylint) and security vulnerabilities (bandit). Returns PASS or FAIL with a detailed breakdown of issues and a score out of 100.

inputs.code: string — the raw Python source code to scan
inputs.filename: string — optional label for the file (default: submitted_code.py)

outputs.lint_issues: list of objects {line, column, type, code, message}
outputs.security_issues: list of objects {line, severity, confidence, code, message}

fail_conditions: Any bandit issue at or above SCANNER_FAIL_THRESHOLD (default: MEDIUM)

agents.name: senior_coder_agent
agents.description: The Gatekeeper. Reviews code submitted by the Coder Agent and returns APPROVED or REJECTED with feedback.

inputs.code: string — Python source code to review
inputs.task_description: string — what the code is supposed to do
inputs.attempt: int — which review attempt this is (max 3)

outputs.feedback: string — specific fix instructions for the Coder Agent
